info.title: Web Report Generator API
info.description: Web Report Generator API. Generate a combined website audit report covering SEO, social metadata, performance, security, content, and crawlability signals. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Generate a combined website audit report covering SEO, social metadata, performance, security, content, and crawlability signals.

url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS website URL to analyze.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
